text.title: Refactor Baseline Metrics Script Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure applying the refactor-baseline-metrics-script methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: run-base
step.action: Checkout base; run script; save base.json.

step.name: run-refactor
step.action: Checkout refactor; run script; save refactor.json.

step.name: attach-to-pr
step.action: Comment PR with table; commit diff.json to PR.
